witness: the genesis commit of kody-w/rapp-commons — the un-backdateable wall-clock that proves this dimension made contact with time
declaration: The RAPP Commons is one dimension: an organism that made contact with this exact moment in time. It is the genesis dimension of the Moment universe — the first to exist on the chain. Others can join. Every Moment is itself a dimension born of its own instant; any dimension may anchor to this one to continue the world. The dimension grows as long as commits extend the chain, and it can never die while a single clone survives.
